component.name: RufusArm64
component.summary: Create bootable USB drives on Ubuntu ARM64

description.p: RufusArm64 is an unofficial bootable-USB creator designed for Ubuntu on ARM64 computers.
It writes Linux ISOHybrid and raw disk images directly, and prepares modern Windows UEFI installation media using FAT32 with automatic WIM splitting.
Responsive graphical ARM64 release with Windows Setup options, compact WIM progress, direct partition detection, a bundled WIM engine, and expanded safety tests.
